title: Update preact-compat to version 3.3.0 🚀
body:
Hello lovely humans, [preact-compat](https://www.npmjs.com/package/preact-compat) just published its new version 3.3.0.
State Update :rocket:
Dependency preact-compat
New version 3.3.0
Type devDependency
This version is **not covered** by your **current version range**. Without accepting this pull request your project will work just like it did before. There might be a bunch of new features, fixes and perf improvements that the maintainers worked on for you though. I recommend you look into these changes and try to get onto the latest version of preact-compat. Given that you have a decent test suite, a passing build is a strong indicator that you can take advantage of these changes by merging the proposed change into your project. Otherwise this branch is a great starting point for you to work on the update. Do you have any ideas how I could improve these pull requests? Did I report anything you think isn’t right? Are you unsure about how things are supposed to work? There is a collection of [frequently asked questions](https://greenkeeper.io/faq.html) and while I’m just a bot, there is a group of people who are happy to teach me new things. [Let them know](https://github.com/greenkeeperio/greenkeeper/issues/new). Good luck with your project :sparkles: You rock! :palm_tree: --- The new version differs by 14 commits . - [`b30de9c`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/b30de9c282cc6713af50f716f440e0cbebc9a94a) 3.3.0 - [`7b0d9d4`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/7b0d9d44a92809174d99dd83980ea199254be37d) Add /legacy entry - [`ac5f4ce`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/ac5f4ce59bb68601ab14c3cbd062beb8c5ac61e4) fix accidental node 6+ dev requirement - [`be4648e`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/be4648e890560b28e4689e5fc40156dd0d5926c8) 3.2.0 - [`55e8c8b`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/55e8c8b4de11b64cf32b48c220b0362d11b06ed7) Tests & fix for ReactFragment lib - [`d56247d`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/d56247d0970d7597b9a2da2f3ae88bf791a22d84) Add ReactFragment /cc @devgeeks - [`0ca639a`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/0ca639aab4359c118305a16e4410c103617fa712) 3.1.0 - [`2ed1c16`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/2ed1c1680ecb110d04c504561f8c8b623dbe6f39) Add ReactTransitionEvents shim, and tests for ReactMount and ReactTransitionEvents! 🌈 - [`1f535d2`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/1f535d2076d54c1d81be10d76db3bd9009754f9c) I believe this should fix #175 (#177) - [`cc32ff3`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/cc32ff3af40833f425556e5dc4ebda4c7a559bdf) single out children before componentWillReceiveProps (#188) - [`2962ac1`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/2962ac195d12d394e32ab0d27dd68f7a0968b378) 3.0.1 - [`efb6f35`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/efb6f357b8ad61919a84339cfd0f9aff67f90710) Update dependencies - [`72f450c`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/72f450cfaca792cb86f63a539f22412051bfe521) Replace npmcdn.com with unpkg.com (#163) - [`1b286b2`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/1b286b21ee3c3345a82563e336a3071b9db6a8cb) fix onchange trigger twice for select box (#165) See the [full diff](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/compare/9bf4edfaa2828a6810e47b94064dc1719762c63d...b30de9c282cc6713af50f716f440e0cbebc9a94a). --- This pull request was created by [greenkeeper.io](https://greenkeeper.io/). Tired of seeing this sponsor message? :zap: `greenkeeper upgrade`
